channel.title: Utilities on EUB's second brain
channel.description: Recent content in Utilities on EUB's second brain

item.title: toolbox: A collection of DIY utilities
item.description:
toolbox is a collection of miscellaneous utilities I built to enhance my Linux desktop/laptop environment. Each tool lives in its own directory with its own README and install script.

Currently available tools:

charger-watts

Displays the negotiated wattage of a connected USB-C PD charger via CLI and a KDE Plasma 6 panel widget. Reads the HWAT field directly from the ThinkPad Embedded Controller via the ec_sys module, with a fallback to UCSI sysfs for non-ThinkPad machines. The Plasma widget is event-driven — it reads the EC only when a charger is plugged or unplugged, with no polling.
